description: Determines what is required to cast a spell. Roll d10 for number of requirements, then d100 for each requirement type.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines what is required to cast a spell. Roll d10 for number of requirements, then d100 for each requirement type.

entries.result: Verbal: Words or sounds must be uttered to cast the spell

resultTranslations.en: Verbal: Words or sounds must be uttered to cast the spell

entries.result: Motion: The spell is cast through physical motion, such as hand waving or dance

resultTranslations.en: Motion: The spell is cast through physical motion, such as hand waving or dance

entries.result: Common Materials: Easily found materials, like dirt or water, are required

resultTranslations.en: Common Materials: Easily found materials, like dirt or water, are required

entries.result: Less Common Materials: Materials that will need to be sought for are required, such as feathers or quartz. They are still easy to obtain

resultTranslations.en: Less Common Materials: Materials that will need to be sought for are required, such as feathers or quartz. They are still easy to obtain

entries.result: Rare Materials: Rare or unusual materials are required that are difficult to obtain, such as a valuable gem or a sword once wielded by a saint

resultTranslations.en: Rare Materials: Rare or unusual materials are required that are difficult to obtain, such as a valuable gem or a sword once wielded by a saint

entries.result: Unique Materials: A unique, one of a kind item is required to cast the spell. Without it the spell won't work

resultTranslations.en: Unique Materials: A unique, one of a kind item is required to cast the spell. Without it the spell won't work

entries.result: Focus: The spell requires a focusing element, such as a holy symbol or wand. The same focus may be used for other spells by this caster as well

resultTranslations.en: Focus: The spell requires a focusing element, such as a holy symbol or wand. The same focus may be used for other spells by this caster as well

entries.result: Ritual: The spell takes a long time to cast and requires a ritual. This needs a dedicated area that is prepared, and the ritual cannot be interrupted

resultTranslations.en: Ritual: The spell takes a long time to cast and requires a ritual. This needs a dedicated area that is prepared, and the ritual cannot be interrupted

entries.result: Runes: Designs or shapes must be drawn to cast this spell, such as chalking a circle on the floor or writing mathematical equations

resultTranslations.en: Runes: Designs or shapes must be drawn to cast this spell, such as chalking a circle on the floor or writing mathematical equations

entries.result: Presence: The spell must be cast in the presence of something specific, such as under the light of the moon or near someone who is in love

resultTranslations.en: Presence: The spell must be cast in the presence of something specific, such as under the light of the moon or near someone who is in love

entries.result: Sacrifice: The spell requires a sacrifice of some kind, commensurate with the power of the spell. This can be anything that can be construed as a cost, such as cutting one's hand or destroying a valuable object

resultTranslations.en: Sacrifice: The spell requires a sacrifice of some kind, commensurate with the power of the spell. This can be anything that can be construed as a cost, such as cutting one's hand or destroying a valuable object

entries.result: Time: The spell takes longer to cast than most spells

resultTranslations.en: Time: The spell takes longer to cast than most spells

entries.result: Laboratory: The spell requires careful and precise ingredients that must be fashioned in a prepared lab

resultTranslations.en: Laboratory: The spell requires careful and precise ingredients that must be fashioned in a prepared lab

entries.result: Strange: Think of the strangest, most dramatic requirement you can for this spell

resultTranslations.en: Strange: Think of the strangest, most dramatic requirement you can for this spell
